feedback.text: Great initiative, we need more things like this in order to make the digital world more safe for consumers. Especially the addictive design of digital products, the mobile market is flooded with games specifically targeting children with a bunch of microtransactions in them. Speaking of games, like other people have mentioned, it would be nice to see it include live service games and games relying on outside servers that are being shut down and unplayable, essentially robbing the consumer of their purchase.
